As in the case of ALIGN, the incorporation of LLM-enhancement features in the LTR training of- fers best results. Those results are boosted even fur- ther when combining visual features, as occurring CLIP CLIP-L ALIGN BLIPC BLIP-LC BLIPF BLIP-LF acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR acc MRR With penalty
